response.justification: Strong distributed systems background with current hands-on experience in AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe, directly aligned with the role's AI-native environment. However, Python is explicitly listed as a must-have skill and is completely absent from the resume. While the candidate's demonstrated ability to master multiple languages suggests they could acquire Python quickly, this gap requires clarification before proceeding.
strengths: Currently Staff Engineer at Stripe with proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators—directly demonstrates comfort in AI-native engineering environments
Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures: handled millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby using async I/O, caching, fibers, and high-performance databases
Strong TypeScript and systems-thinking breadth across multiple senior roles at growth-stage companies; demonstrated ownership mindset (took over iOS/tvOS apps at WatchUp when developer departed)
concerns: Python is a listed must-have skill but is entirely absent from the resume; no Python experience disclosed despite proficiency in multiple other languages
AI/ML hands-on depth is unclear—current Stripe role mentions AI infrastructure but lacks concrete examples of system design decisions, architectural contributions, or LLM/ML product work
Operational ownership and incident-response capability are not explicitly stated; no clear evidence of on-call rotations, incident leadership, or monitoring/alerting system experience

key_factors.factor: Current AI-native environment experience at Stripe
Distributed systems and high-throughput architecture expertise
